subject: [For Review] Jun CB Monthly Management Meeting

content.answer:
Hi Ian/JH,

Please find attached deck for the upcoming Monthly CB Management Meeting on
25th Jun for your review.

CNLS Section is currently WIP and will be updated by 23rd June before 2nd
review.

Let me know if you have any questions.

-- 
*Jason YU*
*Regional CB*
*Mobile*: +65 90284825
*Email*: jason.yu@shopee.com

content.question:
Slide 84-89

   - For the net price comp here on Match SKUs, what is the contribution to
   Shopee ADO and TB ADO for the market?

content.answer:
I briefed SMT and SLS team on my feedback.

@Shuning Wang <shuning.wang@shopee.com> Slide 65: I thought we want to keep
2 shops, one CB and one CNLS, but with some sort of information (sold
count, review, B2B shipping etc) linkage between the 2 shops.

Hi Ian/JH,

Please find v2 of deck updated with content from all BUs and removing the
SLS portion, let me know if further questions.

Responses to Ian/JH question in blue as below:

*Ian Question*

Slide 84-89 (Now 98-105)

   -

   For the net price comp here on Match SKUs, what is the contribution to
   Shopee ADO and TB ADO for the market?



For Shopee, matched SKUs contributed ~1% to ADO, due to a low match rate
and 80%+ of them having no sales in May as most SKUs were from 铺货型
resellers on SHP. This match results are representative and indicate an
assortment gap for Shopee in these categories

For Taobao, we don’t have the exact number as TB front-end only shows
global items sold and thus we are not able to split by site / by category
ADO coverage. Directionally, we estimate TBG coverage to be high because we
crawled based on the top 2,000 best-selling SKUs per keyword(热搜词) of each
L3 category
